description: Testing print functionality including preview, configuration options, multi-user scenarios, and various printing conditions

expected_result: Btn is active when hover mouse. Display Print screen

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check click many times and quickly

expected_result:
Display screen like design:
- Print preview
- Configuration to print

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check template on Print preview default
expected_result: Display format exactly as design/ result screen/ set condition

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check template on Print preview when hide some columns
expected_result: Display format exactly as setting/ result screen/ set condition

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check data on Print preview default
expected_result: Display exact data the same result screen

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check data on Print preview when hide some columns
expected_result: Display exact data the same set conditions
Print preview is changed exactly by selected orientation. Print out exactly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Print with range that user set
expected_result: Print Preview display exactly selected range. Print out successfull and exactly
Print out successfully and exactly, the same with setup

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check function when disconnect or connect Print
expected_result: Connect/ disconnect Print is not aflect Print function
Data, template, text, font are exactly as Print preview (not realtime)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Multi users print at the same time (the same Print/ other Print)
expected_result: Print out successfully. Display exact name format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Valid Activities while print (change tab, open another function, close browser...)
Cancel Print (no click Print on Print Preview or close Print Preview)
